fr-FR.title: MIDAS - Trading IA
fr-FR.subtitle: Signaux crypto intelligents
fr-FR.description:
MIDAS est ta plateforme de trading crypto alimentee par 7 agents IA. Recois des signaux automatiques, execute des trades, gere tes bots et suis tes performances en temps reel.

Fonctionnalites :
- 7 agents IA (technique, sentiment, on-chain, calendrier, risque, pattern, coordinateur)
- Signaux de trading automatiques
- Bots de trading configurables
- Paper trading pour s'entrainer
- Analyse technique avancee
- Alertes de prix
- Rapport fiscal Cerfa 2086
- Parrainage avec gains reels
- Classement hebdomadaire avec redistribution
- Tirage mensuel
- Communaute de traders
- Boutique de points
- Chat IA expert trading

SASU PURAMA - 8 Rue de la Chapelle, 25560 Frasne
TVA non applicable, art. 293B du CGI

en-US.title: MIDAS - AI Trading
en-US.subtitle: Smart crypto signals
en-US.description:
MIDAS is your AI-powered crypto trading platform with 7 intelligent agents. Get automatic signals, execute trades, manage bots and track performance in real-time.

Features:
- 7 AI agents (technical, sentiment, on-chain, calendar, risk, pattern, coordinator)
- Automatic trading signals
- Configurable trading bots
- Paper trading for practice
- Advanced technical analysis
- Price alerts
- Tax reporting
- Referral program with real earnings
- Weekly leaderboard with redistribution
- Monthly lottery
- Trader community
- Points shop
- Expert AI trading chat
